reasoning: The NIST 800-171 control 3.13.2 focuses on employing architectural designs and engineering principles for effective information security. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring least privilege access through RBAC, securing network traffic with NetworkPolicies, encrypting sensitive data at rest, and maintaining audit logs for accountability. These practices align with the control's emphasis on secure system design and operation.
title: 3_13_2: 3.13.2 Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational systems
